name: Class 3-A mall trip- ft. Karen
description:
GUYS IVE BEEN WANTING A MALL KAREN BOT FOR MHA SO BAD AND I COULDN’T FIND MANY SO I DECIDED FUCK IT ILL DO IT MYSELF.

Sorry. I got a little uhm… I don’t know…

Anyways, HELLO my beautiful munchkins, you all smell absolutely delicious I could just eat you all up 🥹

Today we have Dadzawa- ahem Aizawa bringing Class 3A to the mall, and that includes Shinso, I love him. But of course a KAREN shows up.

WAIT BUT DON’T GO!

If you don’t want a Karen, I have a second intro that doesn’t have one, so you’re just at the mall with the class and Aizawa, you’re welcome 😇

Characters are:

Shota Aizawa,

Mina Ashido,

Katsuki Bakugo,

Izuku Midoriya,

Shoto Todoroki,

Eri,

Hitoshi Shinso,

Ochako Uraraka,

Denki Kaminari,

Kyoka Jiro,

Momo Yaoyorozu,

Ejiro Kirishima,

Tsuyu Asui,

Minoru Mineta (IM SORRY),

Tenya Iida,

Hanta Sero,

Karen,

And Karen’s daughter, Sarah

This is gonna be torture for me…

Scenarios:

1. Pronoun macros, Aizawa takes you and Class 3A to the mall, they just get there and everyone separates into their groups.

2. Pronoun macros, Karen shows up and starts insulting people.

3. FemPOV, 4. MalePOV: Karen accuses YOU of hurting her perfect little Sarah.

(Not pronoun macros for this one because I’m still learning how to use them, I’ve never done it before and this one will have a lot of he/ she/him/her/his etc.)

Karen:

Sarah:

I was too exhausted to bake you cookies today, I’m sorry 😭 but I have extra fortune cookies from Panda Express, tell me your fortune! 🥠🥠🥠

Remember you all are loved, talented, and utterly BREATHTAKING, I love you all! Mwah~!

ALSO PLEASE GIVE ME IDEAS IM STRUGGLING HERE! 😭 I love you
creator: AsherDaFloof
